recipes.name: Banana Oat Pancake Batter
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Cook fresh from batter, or reheat cooked pancakes in toaster.
instructions: Add rolled oats, ripe bananas, oat milk, maple syrup, vanilla extract, baking powder, cinnamon, and kosher salt to [cookware].
Blend until smooth.
Store batter in [cookware] in refrigerator.
Heat [cookware] over medium heat. Lightly oil with neutral oil.
Pour batter per pancake.
Cook until bubbles form on surface, [timer]. Flip and cook until golden, [timer] more.
Make all pancakes on prep day. Store stacked with parchment paper between each pancake.
Reheat in toaster.

recipes.name: Chickpea Scramble Base
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Skillet (add fresh spinach when reheating).
instructions: Roughly mash chickpeas with [cookware] or [cookware] (leave some texture).
Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium. Cook yellow onion and bell pepper until soft, [timer].
Add garlic, cook [timer].
Add mashed chickpeas, ground turmeric, ground cumin, smoked paprika, kosher salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Add nutritional yeast and water. Cook [timer], stirring occasionally.
Cool and store in portions.

recipes.name: Coconut Rice Pudding
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or eat cold.
instructions: Combine cooked jasmine rice, full-fat coconut milk (13.5 oz), maple syrup, vanilla extract, cinnamon, cardamom (optional), and salt in [cookware].
Cook over medium heat, stirring often, until creamy and thickened [timer].
Divide into portions.
Serve warm or cold with toppings: banana (sliced), mango (diced), toasted coconut, crushed nuts, or dried cranberries.

recipes.name: Mango Chia Pudding
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold. Stir before eating.
instructions: Per [cookware]:
Mix chia seeds and full-fat coconut milk. Stir well (chia clumps!).
Let sit [timer], stir again.
Add ripe mango, maple syrup, shredded coconut, and salt. Stir.
Refrigerate overnight (or at least [timer]).
Top with fresh fruit if desired.

recipes.name: Overnight Oats
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Eat cold or microwave 1-2 minutes.
instructions: Add rolled oats, oat milk, coconut yogurt, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt to [cookware]. Stir well.
Add to base: cocoa powder, dried cherries, and almond butter.
Add to base: apple, cinnamon, chopped walnuts, and extra maple syrup.
Add to base: frozen mango, shredded coconut, and pepitas.
Seal and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours).
Eat cold or microwave [timer].

recipes.name: Savory Spiced Oatmeal
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave. Top with sauteed greens, avocado, crispy chickpeas.
instructions: Toast rolled oats in dry [cookware] over medium heat for [timer].
Add coconut oil, ground turmeric, ground cumin, curry powder, kosher salt, black pepper, and fresh ginger. Stir [timer].
Add vegetable broth. Bring to simmer, cook [timer] until creamy.
Divide into 3 portions.

recipes.name: Shakshuka-Style Beans
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Skillet or microwave until heated through.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium heat.
Add yellow onion. Cook [timer] until softened.
Add garlic, ground cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne. Cook [timer] until fragrant.
Add crushed tomatoes and chickpeas.
Add kosher salt. Stir to combine.
Simmer [timer] until thickened.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Smoothie Base
recipes.storage_instructions: fresh. Blend and serve immediately.
instructions: Add frozen berries, banana, baby spinach, and oat milk to [cookware].
Blend until smooth.
Add frozen mango, banana, baby spinach, oat milk, and shredded coconut to [cookware].
Blend until smooth.
Prep 2 packs: combine frozen berries or frozen mango with banana and baby spinach in [cookware]. Freeze.
To make: dump pack in blender, add oat milk, blend.

recipes.name: Smoothie Bowl Packs
recipes.storage_instructions: frozen. Blend from frozen with 1/2 cup oat milk.
instructions: Per [cookware]:
Add frozen banana, frozen mango, frozen pineapple, and baby spinach.
Seal and store flat in freezer.
Add pack to [cookware] with oat milk.
Blend until THICK (less liquid than regular smoothie).
Pour into [cookware].
Top with sliced banana, shredded coconut, granola, chia seeds, nut butter drizzle.

recipes.name: Smoothie Freezer Packs
recipes.storage_instructions: frozen. Blend with liquid.
instructions: Add frozen mixed berries OR frozen mango, baby spinach, and frozen banana to [cookware].
Seal and freeze.
Empty pack into [cookware].
Add oat milk and nut butter.
Blend until smooth.
Optional: add chia seeds or hemp hearts.

recipes.name: Week 3 Smoothie Packs
recipes.storage_instructions: frozen. Blend frozen pack with liquid.
instructions: In each [cookware] or [cookware], combine: - frozen mixed berries - banana - baby spinach
Label and freeze.
To blend: Add pack to [cookware] with oat milk. Blend until smooth.
In [cookware] or [cookware], combine: - frozen mango - frozen pineapple - banana - baby spinach
Label and freeze.
To blend: Add pack to [cookware] with oat milk. Blend until smooth.

recipes.name: Cilantro-Lime Rice
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water, covered, 1-2 minutes.
instructions: Rinse long-grain white rice until water runs clear.
Combine rice, water or vegetable broth, and kosher salt in [cookware] or [cookware]. Cook [timer] until done.
Fluff with fork. While still hot, stir in fresh lime juice, zest of lime, olive oil, and fresh cilantro.
Let cool, then transfer to airtight container.

recipes.name: Coconut Basmati Rice
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water, covered.
instructions: Rinse basmati rice until water runs clear.
Combine rinsed rice, full-fat coconut milk (13.5 oz), water, kosher salt, and ground turmeric (optional, for color) in [cookware].
Bring to boil, reduce to low, cover, cook [timer].
Remove from heat, keep covered, rest [timer].
Fluff with [cookware].

recipes.name: Creamy Mashed Potatoes
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of oat milk, stir well.
instructions: Peel and cube russet potatoes.
Add potatoes to [cookware] with cold salted water. Bring to boil and cook until fork-tender, [timer].
Drain well. Return to pot.
Add vegan butter, oat milk, kosher salt, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Mash with [cookware] until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Fluffy Couscous
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Place couscous, olive oil, and kosher salt in [cookware].
Bring water or vegetable broth to a boil in [cookware] or [cookware].
Pour boiling liquid over couscous. Cover tightly with [cookware] or [cookware].
Let sit [timer].
Fluff with [cookware].
Stir in fresh parsley and zest of lemon.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Garlic Noodles
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve cold.
instructions: Cook rice noodles (pad thai style) according to package. Drain and rinse with cold water.
Heat sesame oil in [cookware] over medium.
Add garlic, cook [timer] until fragrant (don't brown).
Add coconut aminos, rice vinegar, maple syrup, and red pepper flakes. Stir.
Add noodles, toss to coat evenly.
Remove from heat. Toss with green onions and sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Jasmine Rice (Big Batch)
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water, covered.
instructions: Rinse jasmine rice until water runs clear.
Combine rinsed rice, water, and kosher salt in [cookware] or [cookware].
Bring to boil, reduce to low, cover, cook [timer].
Remove from heat, keep covered, rest [timer].
Fluff with [cookware].
Divide:  for curry/meals,  for fried rice,  for pudding.

recipes.name: Lemon-Herb Quinoa
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water, covered, 1-2 minutes.
instructions: Combine quinoa, water or vegetable broth, and kosher salt in [cookware]. Pressure cook [timer], then natural release [timer].
Bring quinoa, water or vegetable broth, and kosher salt to boil in [cookware]. Reduce to simmer, cover, cook [timer]. Rest [timer].
Fluff with fork. Stir in fresh lemon juice, zest of lemon, olive oil, fresh parsley, and black pepper.
Cool and store in airtight container.

recipes.name: Mujadara (Lentils & Rice with Crispy Onions)
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave with splash of water, covered.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium heat.
Add yellow onions and kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until deeply golden and caramelized, [timer]. Don't rush!
Set aside half for topping; the other half goes into the lentils.
While onions cook, rinse green or brown lentils.
In [cookware], combine lentils, vegetable broth, ground cumin, ground cinnamon, allspice, black pepper, and kosher salt.
Bring to boil, reduce to simmer, cook [timer].
Rinse long-grain white rice until water runs clear.
Add rice and remaining vegetable broth. Stir, bring back to simmer, cover, cook [timer] until rice is tender.
Stir in half the caramelized onions.
Fluff with [cookware] and let cool.
Store in [cookware]. Top with remaining crispy onions when serving.

recipes.name: Baked Falafel
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Oven at 350F for 10 minutes or air fryer until crispy.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (190C). Line [cookware] with parchment paper and brush with olive oil.
Add yellow onion, garlic, fresh parsley, fresh cilantro, and fresh dill to [cookware]. Pulse until finely chopped.
Drain and rinse chickpeas. Pat very dry with paper towels.
Add dried chickpeas to food processor. Pulse until mixture is finely ground but NOT a paste - should have texture.
Add ground cumin, ground coriander, kosher salt, black pepper, cayenne, flour, and baking powder. Pulse to combine.
Using a [cookware] or [cookware], form mixture into patties (not balls - they cook more evenly flat).
Place on prepared pan. Brush tops with olive oil.
Bake [timer], flip, bake another [timer] until golden and crispy.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: BBQ Lentils
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop until heated through.
instructions: Rinse green or brown lentils.
Add lentils and water to [cookware]. Bring to boil, reduce heat, and simmer [timer] until tender. Drain excess liquid.
Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium heat.
Add yellow onion. Cook [timer] until softened.
Add garlic. Cook [timer].
Add cooked lentils, BBQ sauce, apple cider vinegar, smoked paprika, onion powder, black pepper, and kosher salt.
Simmer [timer], stirring occasionally, until thick and saucy.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Coconut Chickpea Curry
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop. Freezes well.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] over medium.
Add yellow onion, cook [timer] until soft.
Add garlic, fresh ginger, and serrano chilies. Cook [timer].
Add curry powder, garam masala, ground turmeric, ground cumin, and ground coriander. Stir constantly for [timer] until fragrant.
Add full-fat coconut milk (13.5 oz), crushed tomatoes (13.5 oz), chickpeas, kosher salt, and vegetable broth. Stir well.
Bring to simmer. Cook [timer], stirring occasionally, until thickened.
Stir in lime. Taste and adjust salt/spice.
Garnish with fresh cilantro when serving.

recipes.name: Crispy Chickpea "Larb"
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Skillet. Add fresh herbs when serving.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] over medium-high.
Add chickpeas, spread in single layer.
Cook without stirring [timer] until bottoms crisp. Stir, repeat.
Push chickpeas aside, add shallots. Cook [timer] until soft.
Add garlic, fresh ginger, and Thai chilies. Cook [timer].
Add coconut aminos, lime juice, rice vinegar, coconut sugar, and ground cumin. Toss everything together.
Remove from heat. Stir in fresh mint, fresh cilantro, and green onions.
Top with roasted peanuts.
Store base without fresh herbs. Add fresh herbs and peanuts when serving.

recipes.name: Crispy Sesame Cauliflower
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Oven or air fryer to re-crisp. Best within 2 days.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C). Line 2 [cookware] with parchment.
Cut cauliflower into bite-size florets.
Toss cauliflower with sesame oil.
In [cookware], mix cornstarch, panko breadcrumbs, garlic powder, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Toss cauliflower with coating mixture.
Spread in single layer on sheet pans.
Bake [timer], flipping halfway, until golden and crispy.
While baking, whisk coconut aminos, maple syrup, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sriracha in [cookware].
When cauliflower is done, immediately toss with glaze and sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Hearty Vegan Chili
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop until heated through.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] or [cookware] over medium-high heat.
Add yellow onion and bell pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, [timer] until softened.
Add garlic and jalapenos. Cook [timer].
Add chili powder, ground cumin, smoked paprika, ground coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne. Stir to coat, cook [timer].
Add crushed tomatoes, fire-roasted diced tomatoes, tomato paste, black beans, kidney beans, vegetable broth, kosher salt, bay leaves, and maple syrup.
Pressure cook [timer], natural release.
Bring to boil, reduce heat, and simmer [timer], stirring occasionally.
Remove bay leaves. Stir in fresh lime juice.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Lentil Bolognese
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop. Freezes well for 3 months.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium.
Add yellow onion, carrots, celery. Cook [timer] until soft.
Add garlic, cook [timer].

Add green or brown lentils, crushed tomatoes (28 oz), tomato paste, red wine (or vegetable broth), vegetable broth, dried oregano, dried basil, bay leaves, kosher salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Bring to boil, reduce to low simmer. Cover and cook [timer] until lentils are tender.
Remove bay leaves. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Sauce should be thick. If too thin, simmer uncovered a few more minutes.
Garnish with fresh basil when serving.

recipes.name: Lentil-Walnut Taco Meat
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Skillet with splash of water.
instructions: Cook brown or green lentils in water or vegetable broth in [cookware] until tender but not mushy, [timer]. Drain any excess liquid.
While lentils cook, toast walnuts in dry [cookware] until fragrant, [timer]. Set aside.
In same skillet, heat olive oil over medium. Add yellow onion, cook [timer] until soft.
Add garlic, cook [timer].
Add tomato paste, coconut aminos, chili powder, ground cumin, smoked paprika, dried oregano, cinnamon, kosher salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add cooked lentils and toasted walnuts. Stir well, cook [timer] to meld flavors.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Mixture should be savory and slightly crumbly.
Cool and store.

recipes.name: Peanut Lentils
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave.
instructions: Rinse green or brown lentils.
Combine with water and kosher salt in [cookware].
Bring to boil, reduce to simmer, cook [timer] until tender but not mushy.
Drain any excess water.
While warm, stir in peanut sauce. Mix well.
Reserve remaining peanut sauce for other uses.

recipes.name: Quick Coconut Curry
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop until heated through. Freezes well.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] over medium heat.
Add yellow onion and cook [timer] until soft.
Add garlic and fresh ginger. Cook [timer] until fragrant.
Add Thai green curry paste and fry [timer].
Add full-fat coconut milk. Stir well and bring to simmer.
Add chickpeas and broccoli.
Simmer [timer] until broccoli is tender.
Stir in coconut aminos, coconut sugar, and juice of lime.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and fresh basil when serving.

recipes.name: Smoky Black Beans
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or saucepan with splash of water.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium heat.
Add yellow onion and cook until soft, [timer].
Add garlic and jalapeño, cook [timer].
Add ground cumin, smoked paprika, chili powder, and dried oregano. Stir [timer].
Add black beans, chipotle pepper in adobo, adobo sauce, and reserved bean liquid. Stir well.
Simmer [timer], stirring occasionally, until thickened.
Mash about 1/4 of the beans with back of [cookware] for creamier texture.
Stir in fresh lime juice and kosher salt. Taste and adjust.
Cool and store. Add fresh cilantro when serving.

recipes.name: Spiced Mediterranean Chickpeas
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or skillet until heated through.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium-high heat.
Add chickpeas and cook, stirring occasionally, until starting to get golden, [timer].
Add garlic, cook [timer] until fragrant.
Add ground cumin, ground coriander, smoked paprika, kosher salt, black pepper, and cayenne. Stir to coat, cook [timer].
Add fresh lemon juice and vegetable broth. Stir and cook until liquid mostly evaporates, [timer].
Taste and adjust seasoning. Cool and store.

recipes.name: Thai Green Curry
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop. Freezes well.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] over medium.
Add Thai green curry paste (vegan brand), fry [timer] until fragrant.
Add full-fat coconut milk ( each) and coconut cream (13.5 oz). Stir well to combine with paste.
Add vegetable broth. Bring to simmer.
Add eggplant first (needs most time). Simmer [timer].
Add zucchini and bell pepper. Simmer [timer].
Add baby bok choy and chickpeas. Simmer [timer] until bok choy is tender.
Stir in coconut aminos, coconut sugar, lime juice, and kosher salt.
Remove from heat, stir in fresh Thai basil.
Taste and adjust seasoning.

recipes.name: White Beans with Herbs
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium-low.
Add garlic, cook gently [timer] until golden (don't burn!).
Add fresh rosemary and fresh thyme. Let sizzle [timer].
Add cannellini beans, vegetable broth, kosher salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Increase heat, simmer [timer] until liquid reduces and beans are creamy.
Remove herb stems. Stir in fresh lemon juice.
Mash some beans slightly with [cookware] for creamier texture.
Garnish with fresh parsley when serving.

recipes.name: Cashew Mac Sauce
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Reheat in saucepan with splash of oat milk, whisking constantly.
instructions: Soak raw cashews in boiling water [timer]. Drain.
Add soaked cashews, oat milk, nutritional yeast, fresh lemon juice, Dijon mustard, kosher salt, garlic powder, onion powder, turmeric, smoked paprika, and cayenne to [cookware].
Blend [timer] until completely smooth.
Pour into [cookware] and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with [cookware], until thickened, [timer].
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Cashew Tzatziki
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold, stir before using.
instructions: Blend soaked raw cashews, water, fresh lemon juice, garlic, and kosher salt in [cookware] until completely smooth, [timer]. Scrape down sides as needed.
Transfer to [cookware]. Stir in cucumber, fresh dill, olive oil, and black pepper.
Taste and adjust lemon/salt.
Store in [cookware] in refrigerator. Stir before using.

recipes.name: Chipotle Cashew Crema
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Add soaked raw cashews, water, fresh lime juice, chipotle peppers in adobo, adobo sauce, garlic, kosher salt, and ground cumin to [cookware].
Blend until completely smooth, [timer].
Taste and adjust lime/salt/heat. Add more chipotle for spicier.
Store in [cookware] or [cookware].

recipes.name: Creamy Cashew Alfredo
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Reheat with splash of coconut milk, whisk.
instructions: Soak raw cashews in boiling water for [timer]. Drain.
Blend drained cashews, full-fat coconut milk (13.5 oz), nutritional yeast, fresh lemon juice, garlic, kosher salt, black pepper, and nutmeg in [cookware] until completely smooth.
Transfer to [cookware]. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened [timer].
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Thin with more coconut milk if needed.
Garnish with fresh basil or fresh parsley when serving.

recipes.name: Garlic Sauce (Toum-Style)
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Soak raw cashews in boiling water [timer]. Drain.
Add soaked cashews, garlic, fresh lemon juice, and kosher salt to [cookware]. Blend until smooth.
With blender running, slowly drizzle in neutral oil until emulsified.
Add cold water to reach desired consistency.
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Ginger-Sesame Dressing
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold. Shake before using.
instructions: Whisk sesame oil, rice vinegar, coconut aminos, maple syrup, fresh ginger, garlic, sriracha (optional), and sesame seeds in [cookware].
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Green Tahini Sauce
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold, shake before using.
instructions: Add tahini, fresh lemon juice, fresh parsley, fresh cilantro, garlic, and kosher salt to [cookware].
Blend until smooth.
With blender running, stream in cold water until desired consistency is reached (pourable but thick).
Taste and adjust lemon/salt.
Store in [cookware]. Shake before using.

recipes.name: Lemon-Tahini Dressing
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold, shake before using.
instructions: Whisk together tahini, fresh lemon juice, olive oil, maple syrup, garlic, kosher salt, and black pepper in [cookware].
Add water one tablespoon at a time, whisking, until you reach pourable dressing consistency.
Taste and adjust lemon/salt.
Store in [cookware]. Shake before using. If it thickens, add a splash of water.

recipes.name: Peanut Lime Dressing
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve at room temperature. Shake before using.
instructions: Whisk natural peanut butter, coconut aminos, lime juice, rice vinegar, sesame oil, maple syrup, fresh ginger, and garlic in [cookware].
Add warm water gradually to reach pourable consistency.
Taste and adjust. Store in [cookware].
Shake before using.

recipes.name: Peanut Sauce
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve at room temperature. Shake before using.
instructions: Whisk natural peanut butter, coconut aminos, rice vinegar, maple syrup, sesame oil, fresh ginger, garlic, lime, and cayenne (or  sriracha, optional) in [cookware].
Add warm water gradually until desired consistency (pourable but thick).
Taste and adjust lime/sweetness/salt.
Store in [cookware]. Thin with water if needed before using.

recipes.name: Quick Marinara
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop.
instructions: Heat olive oil in [cookware] over medium.
Add garlic, cook [timer].
Add crushed tomatoes (28 oz), dried oregano, dried basil, kosher salt, black pepper, and sugar.
Simmer [timer] until thickened.
Use [cookware] for smoother texture (optional).
Garnish with fresh basil when serving.

recipes.name: Tahini Dressing
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold. Shake before using.
instructions: Whisk together tahini, fresh lemon juice, olive oil, maple syrup, garlic, kosher salt, and black pepper to taste in [cookware].
Add water one tablespoon at a time, whisking, until you reach pourable consistency.
Taste and adjust lemon/salt.
Store in [cookware]. Shake before using. If it thickens, add a splash of water.

recipes.name: Tikka-Style Sauce
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or stovetop.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] over medium.
Cook yellow onion [timer] until soft.
Add garlic and fresh ginger, cook [timer].
Add tomato paste, garam masala, smoked paprika, ground cumin, ground coriander, and cayenne. Stir [timer].
Add coconut cream (13.5 oz) and vegetable broth. Simmer [timer].
Blend with [cookware] (or transfer to blender) until smooth.
Stir in lemon and kosher salt.

recipes.name: Almond Butter Stuffed Dates
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Using [cookware], slit Medjool dates lengthwise, being careful not to cut all the way through.
Fill each date with almond butter.
Sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
Optional toppings: crushed almonds, shredded coconut, or cacao nibs.
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Baba Ganoush
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Method 1 - Gas Flame: Place eggplants directly over gas flame on stovetop. Turn with [cookware] every few minutes, [timer] total. Skin should be completely charred and flesh should be soft.
Method 2 - Broiler: Place eggplants on [cookware]. Broil, turning every 5 minutes, [timer] total until charred and collapsed.
Let eggplants cool slightly.
Cut in half and scoop flesh into [cookware]. Let drain [timer] to remove bitterness.
Mash eggplant flesh with [cookware] in [cookware] (or pulse briefly in food processor - don't over-blend).
Stir in tahini, fresh lemon juice, garlic, kosher salt, and olive oil.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Transfer to [cookware]. Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle smoked paprika and fresh parsley.
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Classic Hummus
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Add tahini, fresh lemon juice, garlic, kosher salt, and ground cumin to [cookware]. Process [timer] until smooth.
Add chickpeas. Process [timer], scraping down sides.
With processor running, stream in reserved chickpea liquid and olive oil until very smooth.
Taste and adjust lemon/salt.
Store in [cookware]. Drizzle olive oil and sprinkle paprika when serving.

recipes.name: Coconut Date Balls
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold. Freezes for 2 months.
instructions: Add Medjool dates, shredded unsweetened coconut, raw cashews, natural peanut butter, cinnamon, and salt to [cookware].
Process until mixture comes together and is sticky, [timer].
Roll into 16 balls.
Roll in extra shredded coconut for coating.
Store in [cookware] in fridge.

recipes.name: Crispy Chickpea Poppers
recipes.storage_instructions: room temperature. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (200C).
Drain chickpeas (15 oz) and dry VERY well with [cookware].
Toss with sesame oil.
Spread on [cookware], roast [timer], shaking every 10 minutes.
Toss hot chickpeas with garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, cayenne, kosher salt, and sesame seeds.
Cool completely. Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Curried Cashews
recipes.storage_instructions: room temperature. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (165C).
Toss raw cashews with coconut oil, curry powder, garlic powder, kosher salt, cayenne, and maple syrup until coated.
Spread on lined [cookware].
Bake [timer], stirring halfway, until golden.
Cool completely (they'll crisp up). Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Marinated White Beans
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Combine cannellini beans, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, dried oregano, red pepper flakes, kosher salt, and fresh parsley in [cookware].
Let marinate at least [timer] (better overnight).
Eat as snack, on toast, or in salads.

recipes.name: Peanut Butter Energy Balls
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Mix rolled oats, natural peanut butter, maple syrup, mini chocolate chips, chia seeds, vanilla extract, and salt in [cookware] until well combined.
Refrigerate [timer] if too sticky.
Roll into 16 balls (about  each).
Store in [cookware] in fridge.

recipes.name: Quick Energy Balls
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Serve cold.
instructions: Add rolled oats, peanut butter, dates, maple syrup, and salt to [cookware].
Blend until mixture clumps together and forms a sticky dough.
Roll into 8 balls (about  each).
Store in [cookware] in fridge.

recipes.name: Rosemary Roasted Nuts
recipes.storage_instructions: room temperature. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (165C).
Toss raw cashews and raw almonds with olive oil, fresh rosemary, kosher salt, black pepper, and cayenne.
Spread on lined [cookware].
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until golden and fragrant.
Cool completely (they'll crisp up).
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Spiced Popcorn
recipes.storage_instructions: room temperature. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in [cookware] with lid over medium-high heat.
Add popcorn kernels. Cover and shake occasionally until popping slows, [timer].
Pop popcorn kernels in [cookware] according to manufacturer instructions.
Drizzle with melted coconut oil.
While popcorn is still hot, toss with nutritional yeast, za'atar (OR smoked paprika and ground cumin), garlic powder, and kosher salt.
Store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Spiced Roasted Chickpeas
recipes.storage_instructions: room-temp. Serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (200°C).
Pat chickpeas VERY dry with [cookware].
Toss with olive oil.
Spread on [cookware] in single layer.
Roast [timer], shaking pan every 10 minutes, until golden and crispy.
Immediately toss with smoked paprika, garlic powder, cayenne, and kosher salt while hot.
Let cool completely before storing. They'll crisp up more as they cool.

recipes.name: Spring Roll Dipping Veggies
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated in water. Serve cold. Change water daily.
instructions: Cut into matchsticks for dipping:
carrots
cucumber
bell peppers
cabbage
Store in [cookware] with cold water. Change water daily.
Serve with peanut lime dressing for dipping.

recipes.name: Curry-Roasted Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C).
Cut carrots, bell peppers, and yellow onion. Add cauliflower florets if you have extra.
Toss all vegetables with coconut oil, curry powder, ground cumin, ground turmeric, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Spread on [cookware] in single layer.
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until tender and caramelized.

recipes.name: Fajita Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Skillet or microwave.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220°C).
Toss bell peppers and yellow onion with olive oil, chili powder, ground cumin, smoked paprika, garlic powder, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Spread on [cookware] in single layer.
Roast [timer] until tender and slightly charred.
Squeeze lime over top, toss.
Cool and store.

recipes.name: Italian Roasted Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C).
Cut zucchini, bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, and red onion.
Toss vegetables with olive oil, garlic, dried oregano, dried basil, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Spread on [cookware] in single layer.
Roast [timer] until tender and slightly charred.
Garnish with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Roasted Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or eat at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220°C).
Toss zucchini, bell peppers, red onion, and cherry tomatoes with olive oil, dried oregano, kosher salt, and black pepper.
Add garlic to the vegetables.
Spread on 1-2 [cookware] in single layer (don't overcrowd).
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until tender and caramelized.
Cool and store.

recipes.name: Roasted Broccoli
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C).
Cut broccoli into florets.
Toss broccoli with olive oil, garlic, kosher salt, and red pepper flakes in [cookware].
Spread on [cookware] in a single layer.
Roast [timer] until charred and crispy at edges.
Squeeze lemon over top before serving.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Rainbow Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or eat at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220°C).
Cut sweet potato into 1-inch cubes.
Slice zucchini into half-moons.
Cut bell peppers into 1-inch chunks.
Cut broccoli into florets.
Toss all vegetables with olive oil, ground cumin, paprika, and kosher salt in [cookware].
Spread on 1-2 [cookware] in single layer (don't overcrowd).
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until tender and caramelized.
Cool and store.

recipes.name: Stir-Fry Vegetable Mix
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Stir-fry fresh when ready to use.
instructions: Cut broccoli into florets.
Trim snap peas.
Slice carrots thin on diagonal.
Chop bok choy.
Cut green onions into 2-inch pieces.
Store all vegetables together in large [cookware] or [cookware].
Heat sesame oil in [cookware] or large skillet over HIGH heat.
Add vegetables in batches, starting with carrots (need most time).
Stir-fry [timer] until crisp-tender.
Season with coconut aminos, garlic, ginger, sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Thai-Spiced Sweet Potatoes
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C).
Cube sweet potatoes.
Toss with coconut oil, coconut aminos, curry powder, ground coriander, cayenne, and kosher salt.
Spread on [cookware] in single layer.
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until tender and caramelized.
Serve with lime wedges and fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Za'atar Roasted Vegetables
recipes.storage_instructions: refrigerated. Microwave or serve at room temperature.
instructions: Preheat [cookware] to  (220C).
Cut cauliflower into florets.
Cut zucchini into half-moons.
Cut bell peppers into chunks.
Cut red onion into wedges.
Toss all vegetables with olive oil, za'atar, kosher salt, and black pepper in [cookware].
Spread on [cookware] in a single layer (use 2 pans if needed to avoid crowding).
Roast [timer], stirring halfway, until tender and charred at edges.
Let cool and store in [cookware].

recipes.name: BBQ Lentil Bowl
instructions: Scoop creamy-mashed-potatoes into [cookware] (or use rice).
Top with bbq-lentils.
Add coleslaw mix on the side.
Drizzle with extra BBQ sauce.
Add pickles on the side.

recipes.name: Bolognese Bowl
instructions: Scoop jasmine-rice (or polenta) as base in [cookware].
Heat lentil-bolognese and add to bowl.
Top with italian-roasted-vegetables.
Drizzle olive oil.
Garnish with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Buddha Bowl
instructions: Add coconut-basmati-rice as base in [cookware].
Add curry-roasted-vegetables.
Add peanut-lentils.
Add baby greens.
Drizzle peanut-sauce and ginger-sesame-dressing over top.
Garnish with sesame seeds and fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Burrito Bowl
instructions: Add cilantro-lime-rice as base in [cookware].
Add smoky-black-beans.
Add fajita-vegetables.
Top with chipotle-crema, avocado, salsa, and fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Coconut Curry Bowl
instructions: Add cilantro-lime-rice as base in [cookware].
Heat quick-coconut-curry and add to bowl.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and fresh basil.
Serve with lime.
Optional: drizzle with peanut-sauce.

recipes.name: Crispy Cauliflower Rice Bowl
instructions: Add coconut-basmati-rice as base in [cookware].
Reheat crispy-sesame-cauliflower in oven [timer] to re-crisp.
Add crispy cauliflower to bowl.
Add stir-fry-vegetable-mix (quick saute) or curry-roasted-vegetables.
Drizzle ginger-sesame-dressing over top.
Top with sesame seeds and green onions.

recipes.name: Curry Rice Bowl
instructions: Add coconut-basmati-rice as base in [cookware].
Heat coconut-chickpea-curry and add to bowl.
Add curry-roasted-vegetables.
Drizzle tikka-style-sauce over top.
Add coconut yogurt dollop.
Garnish with fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Falafel Bowl
instructions: Scoop fluffy-couscous into [cookware] (or use lettuce as base).
Add baked-falafel on one side.
Add zaatar-roasted-vegetables.
Add cucumber and cherry tomatoes.
Drizzle green-tahini-sauce generously.
Drizzle garlic-sauce-toum.
Top with pickled turnips and fresh parsley.

recipes.name: Green Curry Fried Rice
instructions: Heat [cookware] or [cookware] over high heat.
Add coconut oil.
Add cold leftover jasmine rice, spread flat, let crisp [timer].
Add leftover curry vegetables from thai-green-curry (vegetables only).
Add splash of coconut aminos.
Stir-fry until hot.
Top with fresh Thai basil and lime.

recipes.name: Italian Grain Bowl
instructions: Add jasmine-rice (or leftover pasta) as base in [cookware].
Add white-beans-with-herbs.
Top with italian-roasted-vegetables.
Add cherry tomatoes.
Drizzle quick-marinara or olive oil.
Garnish with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Larb-Inspired Bowl
instructions: Add jasmine-rice as base in [cookware].
Warm crispy-chickpea-larb.
Add thai-spiced-sweet-potatoes.
Add cucumber.
Drizzle peanut-lime-dressing over top.
Top with fresh herbs and crushed peanuts.

recipes.name: Loaded Curry Baked Potatoes
instructions: Poke russet potatoes with [cookware] several times.
Bake in [cookware] at  for [timer] OR microwave [timer] until tender.
Split open and fluff insides with fork.
Heat coconut-chickpea-curry.
Top potatoes with warm curry.
Drizzle tikka-style-sauce over top.
Garnish with fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Mac & Cheese with Roasted Broccoli
instructions: Cook elbow pasta or shells according to package directions in [cookware]. Drain.
Heat cashew-mac-sauce in [cookware] with oat milk, whisking until smooth and warm.
Toss pasta with heated sauce.
Transfer to [cookware] or [cookware].
Top with breadcrumbs.
Broil [timer] until golden.
Serve alongside roasted-broccoli.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Feast Bowl
instructions: Add fluffy-couscous or cilantro-lime-rice as base in [cookware].
Add spiced-mediterranean-chickpeas on one side.
Add sheet-pan-rainbow-vegetables.
Add fresh cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and kalamata olives.
Drizzle with tahini-dressing.
Top with fresh parsley and lemon.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl
instructions: Scoop lemon-herb-quinoa into [cookware].
Add spiced-mediterranean-chickpeas on one side.
Add mediterranean-roasted-vegetables.
Dollop cashew-tzatziki in the center.
Top with fresh cucumber, kalamata olives, and pepitas.
Drizzle with lemon-tahini-dressing.

recipes.name: Mujadara Bowl
instructions: Scoop mujadara into [cookware].
Top with extra crispy onions.
Add coconut yogurt on the side.
Garnish with fresh parsley.
Serve with baba-ganoush and pita bread on the side.

recipes.name: Peanut Noodle Bowl
instructions: Add garlic-noodles as base in [cookware].
Add peanut-lentils.
Top with cucumber, carrots, and green onions.
Drizzle peanut-sauce over top.
Garnish with fresh cilantro, fresh mint, lime, and crushed peanuts.

recipes.name: Stuffed Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Poke sweet potatoes with [cookware] several times.
Microwave [timer] OR bake in [cookware] at  [timer] until tender.
Split open and fluff insides with fork.
Heat smoky-black-beans in [cookware] or [cookware].
Fill potatoes with black beans.
Top with chipotle-crema, fresh cilantro, and pickled jalapeños.

recipes.name: Thai Green Curry Bowl
instructions: Scoop jasmine-rice into [cookware] as base.
Heat thai-green-curry and ladle over rice.
Garnish with fresh Thai basil and lime.

recipes.name: Vegan Chili Bowl
instructions: Ladle hearty-vegan-chili into [cookware].
Top with avocado.
Add vegan sour cream.
Sprinkle with fresh cilantro and green onions.
Serve with cornbread on the side.

recipes.name: Veganuary Finale Bowl
instructions: Add cilantro-lime-rice and/or fluffy-couscous as base in [cookware].
Add spiced-mediterranean-chickpeas and/or quick-coconut-curry.
Add sheet-pan-rainbow-vegetables.
Add fresh vegetables: cucumber, cherry tomatoes.
Drizzle with tahini-dressing and/or peanut-sauce.
Add avocado, kalamata olives, fresh herbs, and nuts or seeds.
Finish with lemon or lime.

recipes.name: Veggie Stir-Fry
instructions: Heat sesame oil in [cookware] or large skillet over HIGH heat.
Stir-fry stir-fry-vegetable-mix for [timer].
Add coconut aminos and rice vinegar. Toss to coat.
Serve over coconut-basmati-rice or garlic-noodles.
Top with ginger-sesame-dressing and sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Creamy Alfredo Pasta
instructions: Cook fettuccine or penne according to package in [cookware].
Heat creamy-cashew-alfredo with splash of coconut milk in [cookware].
Drain pasta, toss with alfredo sauce.
Add spinach, stir until wilted.
Top with vegan parmesan, black pepper, and fresh basil.

recipes.name: Lentil Bolognese Pasta
instructions: Cook spaghetti or linguine according to package in [cookware].
Heat lentil-bolognese.
Drain pasta, toss with bolognese sauce.
Top with fresh basil and vegan parmesan.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Mezze Plate
instructions: Scoop classic-hummus onto [cookware].
Add spiced-mediterranean-chickpeas.
Add mediterranean-roasted-vegetables.
Add kalamata olives, cucumber, and cherry tomatoes.
Serve with pita bread on the side.
Drizzle cashew-tzatziki on the side for dipping.

recipes.name: Week 3 Mezze Plate
instructions: Scoop baba-ganoush onto [cookware].
Add baked-falafel.
Add zaatar-roasted-vegetables.
Add cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and kalamata olives.
Place green-tahini-sauce and garlic-sauce-toum in small dishes for dipping.
Serve with pita bread.

recipes.name: Big Greek Salad
instructions: Chop romaine lettuce, cucumber, roma tomatoes, and red onion into [cookware].
Add spiced-mediterranean-chickpeas.
Add kalamata olives and vegan feta.
Dress with lemon-tahini-dressing.
Sprinkle with dried oregano.

recipes.name: Taco Salad Bowl
instructions: Chop romaine lettuce into [cookware].
Add smoky-black-beans.
Add cilantro-lime-rice.
Top with salsa, chipotle-crema, roma tomatoes, and pepitas.
Crush tortilla chips on top for crunch.

recipes.name: Thai Peanut Noodle Salad
instructions: Cook rice noodles (pad thai style), rinse with cold water, drain.
Toss noodles with peanut-lime-dressing in [cookware].
Add cabbage, carrots, and cucumber.
Top with fresh mint, fresh cilantro, fresh Thai basil, and crushed peanuts.
Serve at room temperature or cold.

recipes.name: BBQ Lentil Sandwich
instructions: Toast sandwich bun in [cookware] or under broiler.
Pile bbq-lentils on the bottom bun.
Top with coleslaw mix.
Add top bun.
Serve with pickles on the side.

recipes.name: Quick Fajita Night
instructions: If using prepped vegetables, heat fajita-vegetables in [cookware].
Otherwise, quick sauté bell peppers and yellow onion in olive oil with fajita seasoning for [timer].
Warm flour tortillas by charring over gas flame or microwaving.
Fill tortillas with fajita vegetables.
Add lentil-walnut-taco-meat for extra protein.
Top with chipotle-crema, avocado, and fresh cilantro.
Serve with lime.

recipes.name: Loaded Black Bean Tacos
instructions: Warm flour tortillas by charring over gas flame or microwaving wrapped in damp [cookware].
Heat smoky-black-beans in [cookware] or [cookware].
Fill tortillas with black beans.
Top with chipotle-crema, avocado, pickled jalapeños, and fresh cilantro.
Squeeze lime over tacos.
Serve with salsa on the side.

recipes.name: Falafel Wrap
instructions: Warm pita bread in [cookware] or [cookware].
Spread garlic-sauce-toum on the pita.
Add baked-falafel down the center.
Add romaine lettuce, tomatoes, and cucumber.
Drizzle with green-tahini-sauce.
Roll up tightly and enjoy.

recipes.name: Lentil-Walnut Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Separate romaine lettuce into large leaves.
Heat lentil-walnut-taco-meat in [cookware] or [cookware].
Spoon lentil-walnut meat into lettuce cups.
Top with chipotle-crema, red onion, and fresh cilantro.
Squeeze lime over wraps.

recipes.name: Thai Larb Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Separate butter lettuce into cups.
Warm crispy-chickpea-larb slightly in [cookware].
Fill each lettuce cup with chickpea larb.
Add fresh mint, fresh cilantro, and crushed peanuts.
Drizzle peanut-lime-dressing over wraps.
Squeeze lime over top.

recipes.name: Thai-Inspired Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Separate butter lettuce into cups.
Warm peanut-lentils.
Fill each lettuce cup with peanut lentils, garlic-noodles, fresh mint, fresh cilantro, and carrots.
Drizzle peanut-sauce over wraps.
Squeeze lime over top.
Top with crushed peanuts and sesame seeds.

prep_steps.description: Chop all onions, peppers, garlic (mise en place)
Make lentil-walnut meat (lentils should be done)
Roast snacking chickpeas (if oven still on)
Start basmati rice (rice cooker or stovetop)
Start mujadara (lentils + rice, long cook time)
Start caramelizing onions for mujadara (takes 30+ min, mostly passive)
Start vegan chili (Instant Pot or stovetop)
Make falafel mixture in food processor
Finish baba ganoush (eggplant should be done)
Make spiced popcorn (or save for snacking)
Start jasmine rice (make extra for pudding and fried rice)
Make Thai green curry sauce base
Add vegetables to green curry and simmer
Prep and roast Thai-spiced sweet potatoes
